activities.title: Texture Painter 3D
activities.desc: I created a Unity VR application for authoring object textures in a 3D environment, with an emphasis on intuitive controls and interactions.

activities.title: Event-based DataVis for Gameplay
activities.desc: I created a proof-of-concept visualization technique for videogame gameplay recordings that can be transcribed into a timeseries dataset of events.

activities.title: A Small-Scale Fluid Framework
activities.desc: I implemented a compute-shader based 3D fluid simulation using a variant of smoothed particle hydrodynamics (SPH) in Godot.

activities.title: Drill Diver
activities.desc: I helped develop the 2D speedrunning platformer "Drill Diver" as part of a team for UCF's AI for Game Programming course in Fall 2025. Drill Diver was awarded the "Best Game Design" award.

activities.title: "The Bias is in the Details: An Assessment of Cognitive Bias in LLMs"
activities.desc: I helped develop a custom dataset to measure cognitive bias-like patterns in LLMs. Submitted to TACL in 2025; awaiting final decision.

activities.title: "TAGMI - A Taxonomy for Artificial General Machine Intelligence"
activities.desc: I co-authored a proposed framework for classifying types of artifical intelligence based on foundations of cognitive psychology.

activities.title: MTU Senior Design Project
activities.desc: I built a simple profiling pipeline for proprietary software using Bash, C, and C++. Learn more about the project at the link.
